violations.text: Establishment is portioning food into bags. Establishment does not have a prep area with a handwashing sink. Establishment must discontinue portioning food. Per person in charge, establishment will no longer portion/package food in the establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Establishment is vacuum packaging peppers without approval. Establishment to cease ROP packaging until HACCP plan has been submitted, reviewed and approved by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Vegetables were observed stored on the ground outside. Food must be stored inside, in a protected location. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
